text.title: Growth Twitter X Growth Decision Tree
text.summary: Run-or-skip gate based on preconditions, then a second-level question routing to a rule-id conclusion. Minimum-form tree for a methodology of this shape.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the unique-angle statement locked in AND ≥20 larger-account reply targets curated?

branch.question: Can the operator sustain 3-5 posts/day AND 20-30 replies/day for ≥90 days?

branch.conclusion: Run the playbook-step: 3-5 posts/day + 1-2 threads/week + 20-30 replies/day.
Skip this methodology. X compounds on consistency; fix capacity before launching.
Skip launch; write unique-angle sentence + curate reply targets first.

text.example: angle='I tear down indie SaaS pricing pages' targets=22 capacity=60min/day → run playbook per r2-three-to-five-daily.
